_comment: Trimmed REAL capture: getPlayerStats role=1 (jungle) for aeon#na3 / na1, 2026-06-28. Fields reduced to our minimal selection set (championId/totalMatches/wins + block role/queueType/seasonId). 64=LeeSin pure jungle, 799=Ambessa flex-split (78 of 81 season games were jungle), 254=Vi low-game, 200=Belveth 1-game. Second block is the empty ranked-flex (440) result.
